detail.description:
Call of Duty: Mobile Season 4 2026: Eternal Prison

Lock in or get locked up in Call of Duty®: Mobile Season 4: Eternal Prison is here. Jump into Godzilla x Kong: The New Empire content, deploy into the first season of DMZ: Recon, and experience Rebirth Island in both DMZ: Recon and Battle Royale. 

Log in to the game and enjoy the new content after the update!

[New DMZ: Recon Map - Rebirth Island]
Classic returns, heart-pumping upgrades! The classic map Alcatraz will undergo a complete overhau
detail.releaseNotes:
● New DMZ: Recon Map - Rebirth Island; The classic map Alcatraz will undergo a complete overhaul and join the battlefield as the new map Rebirth Island.
● New DMZ: Recon Feature - Crafting System; The classic map Alcatraz will undergo a complete overhaul and join the battlefield as the new map Rebirth Island.
● New MP Ranked Mode - League Play; Once soldiers reach the "Legendary" rank in the Multiplayer Ranked, they will be able to select League Play from the mode selection menu to compete.
● New Wildcard: Perk Booster; Scorestreaks will be replaced with an additional set of Passive Skills, which can be activated by spending score. 
● New BR Map - Rebirth Island; With infinite redeploys, contracts to complete, and cash to collect for Airdrops and brand-new Scorestreaks at the Buy Station, it's time to jump back into the fray!
● New BR Feature - Killcam; This feature is still in the testing phase, and we welcome your feedback.
● Themed Event - Project: Titan Frequency; Unleash Titans' power together, with even more themed rewards waiting for you!

inferredReasons.label: 🔍 待深入調查
